# TrAIner – Copilot Agent Instructions

> **Purpose:** This file gives a coding agent all the context needed to work efficiently on the TrAIner repository from scratch. Read it completely before making any changes.

---

## 1. Project Overview

**TrAIner** is a **mobile-first** web application that acts as an AI-powered personal trainer and nutritionist. Users complete an onboarding wizard, receive a personalised workout plan and diet schedule generated by an AI model, log meals and workouts daily, and interact with a persistent AI chat assistant.

- **Language:** The UI and all user-facing copy are in **Italian**.
- **Target device:** Mobile (max-width 448 px / `max-w-md`). Desktop browsers show the app centred with side padding.
- **Deployment target:** Vercel (serverless, Node.js runtime).

---

## 2. Repository Structure

```
trainer-project/
├── app/                          # Next.js App Router pages + API routes
│   ├── api/
│   │   ├── chat/route.ts         # POST – AI chat via OpenRouter
│   │   ├── db-init/route.ts      # GET  – DB collection + index initialisation
│   │   ├── generate-plan/route.ts# POST – AI workout + diet plan generation
│   │   ├── logs/route.ts         # GET/POST – daily nutrition/training logs
│   │   └── profile/route.ts      # GET/POST – user profile CRUD
│   ├── diary/page.tsx            # Food diary (add/edit/delete meals, barcode scan)
│   ├── onboarding/page.tsx       # Multi-step onboarding wizard
│   ├── profile/page.tsx          # View workout plan + weekly diet
│   ├── page.tsx                  # Dashboard (home)
│   ├── layout.tsx                # Root layout (fonts, AiChatSheet, BottomNav)
│   └── globals.css               # Tailwind v4 imports + CSS custom properties
├── components/
│   ├── ui/                       # shadcn/ui primitive components
│   │   ├── button.tsx
│   │   ├── card.tsx
│   │   ├── dialog.tsx
│   │   ├── input.tsx
│   │   ├── progress.tsx
│   │   └── sheet.tsx
│   ├── AiChatSheet.tsx           # Persistent AI chat bottom sheet
│   ├── BarcodeScanner.tsx        # Webcam-based barcode scanner
│   └── BottomNav.tsx             # Fixed bottom navigation bar
├── lib/
│   ├── mongodb.ts                # MongoDB singleton with serverless caching
│   ├── utils.ts                  # cn() Tailwind class-merge helper
│   ├── store/
│   │   └── aiChatStore.ts        # Zustand store for AI chat state
│   └── types/
│       └── database.ts           # All shared TypeScript interfaces
├── docs/
│   └── refactor-baseline-checklist.md  # Refactoring roadmap & smoke-test guide
├── public/                       # Static SVG assets
├── .github/
│   └── copilot-instructions.md   # this file
├── next.config.ts
├── tsconfig.json
├── postcss.config.mjs
├── eslint.config.mjs
├── components.json               # shadcn/ui config
└── package.json
```

---

## 3. Tech Stack & Versions

| Tool | Version | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Next.js | 16.1.6 | App Router, React Server Components |
| React | 19.2.3 | |
| TypeScript | ^5 | Strict mode enabled |
| Tailwind CSS | ^4 | No `tailwind.config.ts` – configured via `postcss.config.mjs` + `globals.css` |
| shadcn/ui | ^4.0.7 | Style: `base-nova`, icons: `lucide-react` |
| MongoDB driver | ^7.1.0 | Direct driver (no Mongoose) |
| Zustand | ^5.0.11 | With `persist` middleware |
| OpenAI SDK | ^6.29.0 | Pointed at OpenRouter base URL |
| @zxing/library | ^0.21.3 | Barcode/QR decoding |
| react-webcam | ^7.2.0 | Camera access for barcode scanner |
| recharts | ^3.8.0 | Nutrition progress charts |
| react-markdown + remark-gfm | ^10 / ^4 | Renders AI responses |
| date-fns | ^4.1.0 | Date formatting |
| uuid | ^13.0.0 | `uuidv4()` for message/meal IDs |

---

## 4. Environment Variables

Create a `.env.local` file (never commit it). Required variables:

```
MONGODB_URI=mongodb+srv://<user>:<password>@<cluster>.mongodb.net/trainer_db
OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-or-...
```

- `MONGODB_URI` is validated at module load in `lib/mongodb.ts` – the app throws immediately if absent.
- `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` is used in all AI route files (`app/api/chat/route.ts`, `app/api/generate-plan/route.ts`).

---

## 5. Development Commands

```bash
npm run dev      # Start dev server (http://localhost:3000)
npm run build    # Production build (TypeScript errors are intentionally suppressed – see next.config.ts)
npm run start    # Serve production build
npm run lint     # ESLint (next + typescript rules)
```

> **Note:** `next.config.ts` sets `typescript.ignoreBuildErrors: true`. TypeScript errors will NOT fail the build. Always run `tsc --noEmit` separately if you need strict type checking.

**There is no test framework.** No Jest/Vitest configuration exists. Validate changes manually using the smoke-test guide in `docs/refactor-baseline-checklist.md`.

---

## 6. Architectural Rules (non-negotiable)

### 6.1 State Management – Zustand only
- **Never use React Context API** for global async AI chat state. It causes cascade re-renders.
- All cross-component state lives in Zustand stores under `lib/store/`.
- The AI chat store (`aiChatStore.ts`) persists `messages` to `localStorage` (key: `trainer-ai-chat-storage`). `isOpen` is intentionally excluded from persistence.

### 6.2 MongoDB – Serverless connection caching
- Import `clientPromise` from `@/lib/mongodb` in every API route. **Never create a `new MongoClient()` directly in a route handler.**
- In development, the client is cached on the Node.js `global` object to survive HMR reloads.
- In production (Vercel Lambda), the module is loaded once per instance.
- Database name: `trainer_db`. Collections: `user_profiles`, `daily_logs`.
- The index `{ userId: 1, date: -1 }` (unique) on `daily_logs` is created by `GET /api/db-init`.

### 6.3 AI Integration – OpenRouter
- All AI calls use the **OpenAI SDK** configured with:
  - `baseURL: "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"`
  - `apiKey: process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY`
  - Required headers: `HTTP-Referer`, `X-Title`
- Primary model: `nvidia/nemotron-nano-12b-v2-vl:free`
- Do not switch to a different model or API provider without explicit instruction.
- AI responses are always in **Italian**.

### 6.4 Dense Documents for AI context
- Data sent as AI context must be pre-aggregated (denormalised) to minimise token usage.
- Never send raw MongoDB documents directly to the AI. Always compute deltas, percentages, and plain-text summaries first (see helper functions in `app/api/chat/route.ts`).

### 6.5 Mobile-first layout
- The root `<div>` in `app/layout.tsx` is `max-w-md w-full` centred on the page.
- `AiChatSheet` and `BottomNav` are always rendered in the root layout and persist across page navigations.
- Bottom navigation uses `pb-16` padding to avoid content being hidden behind the nav bar.

---

## 7. Data Model (TypeScript Types in `lib/types/database.ts`)

### UserProfile (collection: `user_profiles`)
```typescript
interface UserProfile {
  userId: string;            // hardcoded to "tester-user-123" in prototype
  name: string;
  onboarding_input?: OnboardingInput;
  personal_info: UserPersonalInfo;   // age, weight, height, gender, activity_level
  targets: NutritionTargets;         // daily_calories, daily_protein_g, daily_carbs_g, daily_fats_g, daily_water_ml
  workout_plan: {
    split_name: string;
    description: string;
    schedule: WorkoutDay[];          // one entry per day, day_name in Italian
  };
  diet_plan: { weekly_schedule: DietDay[] };
  diet_rules: DietRules;
}
```

### DailyLog (collection: `daily_logs`, indexed on `{ userId, date }`)
```typescript
interface DailyLog {
  userId: string;
  date: string;              // "YYYY-MM-DD"
  metrics: { weight_kg?, body_fat_percentage?, sleep_hours?, subjective_energy_level? };
  daily_nutrition_summary: {
    total_calories: number;
    total_proteins_g: number;
    total_carbs_g: number;
    total_fats_g: number;
    water_intake_ml: number;
  };
  meals_log: Meal[];
  training_log: TrainingSession[];
}
```

### Meal
```typescript
interface Meal {
  id: string;               // uuid
  time: string;             // "HH:MM"
  meal_type?: 'colazione' | 'pranzo' | 'cena' | 'snack';
  name: string;
  calories: number;
  proteins_g: number;
  carbs_g: number;
  fats_g: number;
}
```

### WorkoutDay
Day names are in Italian: `"Lunedì"`, `"Martedì"`, `"Mercoledì"`, `"Giovedì"`, `"Venerdì"`, `"Sabato"`, `"Domenica"`.

---

## 8. API Routes Reference

### `POST /api/chat`
- **Body:** `{ messages: ChatMessage[] }`
- **Response:** `{ content: string }`
- Fetches the user profile and today's log from MongoDB, builds a pre-calculated nutrition/workout comparison, and injects it into the AI system prompt.
- Detects "report" requests via regex: `/\b(report|recap|riepilogo|andamento|analisi|...)\b/i`

### `POST /api/generate-plan`
- **Body:** Full `OnboardingInput` object
- **Response:** `{ success: true, profile: UserProfile }`
- Calls the AI in parallel (workout plan + diet plan), with a fallback if AI fails.
- Saves the resulting `UserProfile` to MongoDB via upsert.

### `GET /api/profile?userId=<id>`
- **Response:** `UserProfile` or `{ message: "Profilo non trovato" }`

### `POST /api/profile`
- **Body:** `{ userId, profileData }`
- **Response:** Upserted profile document

### `GET /api/logs?userId=<id>&date=YYYY-MM-DD`
- **Response:** `DailyLog` (creates empty log if none exists)

### `POST /api/logs`
- **Body:** `{ action, userId, date, ... }`
- **Actions:** `add_meal` | `edit_meal` | `delete_meal` | `update_water`
- Auto-recalculates `daily_nutrition_summary` totals after every mutation.
- **Response:** `{ success: true, log: DailyLog }`

### `GET /api/db-init`
- Creates collections and indexes. Safe to call repeatedly (idempotent).

---

## 9. Key Components

### `AiChatSheet`
- A `Sheet` (bottom drawer) that is always mounted in the root layout.
- State is managed exclusively via `useAiChatStore` (Zustand).
- Renders AI messages using `react-markdown` + `remark-gfm`.
- Sends `POST /api/chat` with the full current message array.

### `BarcodeScanner`
- Uses `react-webcam` + `@zxing/library` (`BrowserMultiFormatReader`) to decode barcodes.
- On successful scan, calls the **Open Food Facts API** (`https://world.openfoodfacts.org/api/v0/product/<barcode>.json`) to retrieve nutritional data.
- Runs decoding in a `useEffect` loop with a 500 ms interval.

### `BottomNav`
- Three links: `/` (Home), `/diary` (Diario), `/profile` (Profilo).
- Uses `usePathname()` for active state highlighting.

---

## 10. Prototype User ID

The entire app currently uses a **single hardcoded user**:

```typescript
const PROTOTYPE_USER_ID = "tester-user-123";
```

This constant is duplicated across multiple API routes. When implementing multi-user support, search for all occurrences and replace with a session-based user ID.

---

## 11. Path Aliases

The `tsconfig.json` defines a single alias:
```json
"@/*": ["./*"]
```
Use `@/components/...`, `@/lib/...`, `@/app/...` etc. for all imports within the project.

---

## 12. Styling Conventions

- **Tailwind CSS v4** – no separate config file. All configuration is done via CSS custom properties in `app/globals.css` and the PostCSS plugin in `postcss.config.mjs`.
- **shadcn/ui** – components live in `components/ui/`. Add new ones with `npx shadcn@latest add <component>`.
- The `cn()` utility from `@/lib/utils` merges Tailwind classes (wraps `clsx` + `tailwind-merge`). Always use it when combining conditional classes.
- Font variables: `--font-geist-sans` and `--font-geist-mono` are set on `<body>`.

---

## 13. Critical Flows to Preserve

When modifying any file, ensure these flows continue working end-to-end:

1. **Onboarding → Plan Generation:** `app/onboarding/page.tsx` → `POST /api/generate-plan` → MongoDB `user_profiles`
2. **Dashboard:** `app/page.tsx` fetches `GET /api/profile` + `GET /api/logs` and displays nutrition + workout summaries.
3. **Food Diary:** Add, edit, and delete meals in `app/diary/page.tsx` via `POST /api/logs`. Macro totals must recalculate correctly.
4. **AI Chat:** Messages sent from `AiChatSheet` reach `POST /api/chat` and return a markdown-formatted Italian response.
5. **Barcode Scanner:** Camera opens, decodes a barcode, fetches Open Food Facts, and pre-fills the meal form in `app/diary/page.tsx`.

---

## 14. Known Issues & Workarounds

- **TypeScript build errors are suppressed** (`typescript.ignoreBuildErrors: true` in `next.config.ts`). This was a deliberate decision to allow faster iteration. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to surface all type errors.
- **BOM character in some files:** Several source files begin with a UTF-8 BOM (`\uFEFF`). Do not add this when creating new files.
- **Single prototype user:** All API routes use `PROTOTYPE_USER_ID = "tester-user-123"`. Authentication and multi-user support have not yet been implemented.
- **No automated tests:** Validate all changes manually using the smoke-test checklist in `docs/refactor-baseline-checklist.md`.
- **Open Food Facts API** is called directly from the browser in `BarcodeScanner.tsx`. CORS is allowed by Open Food Facts for browser requests.

---

## 15. Adding New shadcn/ui Components

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add <component-name>
```

Components are installed into `components/ui/`. The configuration in `components.json` sets the path aliases automatically.

---

## 16. Deployment Notes

- Deployed on **Vercel**. All API routes run as serverless functions.
- Set `MONGODB_URI` and `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` as Vercel environment variables.
- The `outputFileTracingRoot: process.cwd()` setting in `next.config.ts` ensures the MongoDB driver's native bindings are included in the serverless bundle.
